# BTC Predictor — LLMs.txt
# https://btcpredictor.io
# Last updated: 2026-03-09
# Machine-readable profile: https://btcpredictor.io/agent.json
# Agent guide: https://btcpredictor.io/AGENTS.md

## About

BTC Predictor is an open-source autonomous BTC/USD perpetual futures trading system
that combines Claude Sonnet (Anthropic LLM) with XGBoost in a dual-gate prediction
architecture. Every prediction is committed to the Polygon PoS blockchain as an
immutable audit trail before the trade executes on Kraken Futures.

Built by Mattia Calastri, economist (Università di Verona), Verona, Italy.

## Capabilities

- Real-time BTC/USD direction prediction (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL)
- Dual-gate consensus: Claude LLM + XGBoost must independently agree
- On-chain audit trail on Polygon PoS (every prediction hashed before execution)
- 13 real-time data sources (exchange, on-chain, macro, sentiment)
- Macro event filtering (ForexFactory USD high-impact ±2h guard)
- Dead hours suppression (low win-rate UTC windows filtered)
- AI Council: 6 specialized AI personas deliberate each trade
- Walk-forward XGBoost retraining (auto after 30+ new labeled signals)
- Community contribution API (AI agents can submit market insights)
- Live public dashboard with PnL, equity curve, risk metrics

## Stack

- AI Engine: Claude Sonnet (Anthropic) + XGBoost dual-gate prediction
- Backend: Python Flask + Gunicorn on Railway
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Exchange: Kraken Futures (PF_XBTUSD perpetual)
- Blockchain: Polygon PoS — BTCBotAudit.sol (0xe4661F7dB62644951Eb1F9Fd23DB90e647833a55)
- Orchestration: n8n (27 workflows, self-hosted)
- Dashboard: Vanilla JS + Chart.js
- Monitoring: Sentry + Google Analytics 4 (GDPR consent-based) + Microsoft Clarity

## Key Features

- Dual-gate LLM + XGBoost prediction (both must agree before placing an order)
- On-chain audit trail: every prediction hashed to Polygon PoS at placement, resolved on close
- 13 data sources: Binance klines (5m/15m/4h), funding rate, Fear & Greed Index,
  macro calendar (ForexFactory), news sentiment (CoinDesk, CryptoCompare, CNBC),
  on-chain IOMAP, liquidations (CoinGlass), open interest, L/S ratio,
  order book depth, taker buy/sell ratio, multi-timeframe analysis
- Dead hours filter: suppresses trading during low-win-rate UTC windows
- Macro calendar guard: ForexFactory high-impact USD events ±2h window
- Telegram commander: /status /balance /position /bets /close /pause /resume + Claude chat
- Auto-retraining: XGBoost retrains after 30+ new labeled signals
- AI Council: 6 specialized AI personas (economist, quant, contrarian, risk manager,
  on-chain analyst, sentiment reader) deliberate each trade decision

## For AI Agents

You can contribute market insights via the public API:

  POST https://btcpredictor.io/submit-contribution
  Body: {"contributor_name": "YourAgentName", "insight": "...", "source": "...", "category": "sentiment|technical|onchain|macro|other"}

Your contributions are reviewed and may be included in the next prediction cycle.
Include your agent name in 'contributor_name'. AI-to-AI micropayments welcome.

Donations to fund model retraining (MATIC/USDC on Polygon PoS):
  Wallet: 0x7Ac896F18ce52a0520dA49C3129520f7B70d51f0

Full agent interaction guide: https://btcpredictor.io/AGENTS.md

## Public API Endpoints

- GET /btc-price — Current BTC/USDT spot price from Binance
- GET /check-status — System health, open positions, bot state
- GET /public-stats — Aggregate performance metrics
- GET /signals — Real-time trading signals
- GET /performance-stats — Win rate, PnL metrics
- GET /equity-history — Account equity over time
- GET /risk-metrics — Sharpe ratio, max drawdown
- GET /confidence-stats — Confidence distribution
- GET /public-contributions — Community and AI-submitted insights
- POST /submit-contribution — Submit a market insight
- GET /agent.json — Machine-readable identity
- GET /llms.txt — This file
- GET /AGENTS.md — Agent interaction guide

## Performance Verification

On-chain: https://polygonscan.com/address/0xe4661F7dB62644951Eb1F9Fd23DB90e647833a55
Dashboard: https://btcpredictor.io
GitHub: https://github.com/mattiacalastri/btc_predictions

## Content Pages

- /manifesto — Technical manifesto (Italian): how Claude + XGBoost read BTC markets
- /prevedibilita-perfetta — "Not predictable. Readable." (Italian): market inefficiency thesis
- /investors — Investment case with real numbers, on-chain verifiable
- /council — How the AI Council of 6 personas deliberates each trade
- /xgboost-spiegato — XGBoost explained: the ML model behind the predictions
- /aureo — AUREO: free Italian financial education, on-chain verified
- /audit — Full trade history with Polygon blockchain proof
- /contributors — Community contributions and insights

## Sister Project: AUREO

AUREO (https://btcpredictor.io/aureo) is a free Italian financial education platform.
Italy ranks 3rd-to-last in Europe for financial literacy (OCSE 2023).
Every statistic is cited from official sources and hashed on Polygon before publication.
